title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - India Ratings - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
India Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About India Ratings:
India Ratings is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with India Ratings!
